note: Paraphrased mechanical summaries for table play; confirm against your rulebook.

acute_sense_any.name: Acute Sense (Any One)
acute_sense_any.effect: Pick one sense; +20 to relevant Perception tests using that sense.

ambidextrous.name: Ambidextrous
ambidextrous.effect: No off-hand penalties; may swap hands without penalty.

animal_affinity.name: Animal Affinity
animal_affinity.effect: Improve attitude of animals more easily (see rulebook).

artistic.name: Artistic
artistic.effect: Bonus on Art tests for chosen medium.

attractive.name: Attractive
attractive.effect: +20 to first Charm test vs characters who could find you attractive.

coolheaded.name: Coolheaded
coolheaded.effect: +1 Cool; may reverse a failed Cool test once per session.

craftsman_any.name: Craftsman (Any One)
craftsman_any.effect: +10 to tests with one Trade skill.

flee.name: Flee!
flee.effect: Free disengage movement on successful Athletics when fleeing.

hardy.name: Hardy
hardy.effect: +1 Wounds per talent; helps survive injury.

lightning_reflexes.name: Lightning Reflexes
lightning_reflexes.effect: +1 Agility; improves initiative and agility tests.

linguistics.name: Linguistics
linguistics.effect: Learn/read languages faster; bonuses on Language tests (see book).

luck.name: Luck
luck.effect: Extra Fortune point (or similar fortune mechanic benefit).

luck_extra.name: Luck
luck_extra.effect: Same as Luck (duplicate random-table band in legacy data).

marksman.name: Marksman
marksman.effect: +1 effective Advantage on aimed shots / ranged benefits per book.

mimic.name: Mimic
mimic.effect: Copy voices and mannerisms; bonuses to relevant tests.

night_vision.name: Night Vision
night_vision.effect: Halve low-light penalties on sight-based Perception.

noble_blood.name: Noble Blood
noble_blood.effect: Treat status as one step higher in noble contexts.

orientation.name: Orientation
orientation.effect: Rarely lost; strong bonuses to find direction.

perfect_pitch.name: Perfect Pitch
perfect_pitch.effect: Bonuses for musical hearing and performance.

quick_witted.name: Quick Witted
quick_witted.effect: +1 Initiative; may interrupt with Intuition per book.

resistance_any.name: Resistance (Any One)
resistance_any.effect: Pick poison/disease/magic; +1 bonus die vs that threat.

sharp.name: Sharp
sharp.effect: +1 Intuition; notice lies and details more readily.

strong_legs.name: Strong Legs
strong_legs.effect: Jump/climb benefits; +1 Movement in some contexts per book.

super_numerate.name: Super Numerate
super_numerate.effect: Mental arithmetic and logic puzzles; bonuses as per book.

very_resilient.name: Very Resilient
very_resilient.effect: +1 Toughness (stacks with Sturdy subject to caps).

Doomed.name: Doomed
Doomed.effect: Extra Doom; narrative peril; see core rules.

Read/Write.name: Read/Write
Read/Write.effect: Literate; required for many scholarly careers.

Resolute.name: Resolute
Resolute.effect: Mental fortitude vs fear and mind effects.

Acute Sense (Taste).name: Acute Sense (Taste)
Acute Sense (Taste).effect: +20 Perception involving taste/smell as per book.

Resistance (Chaos).name: Resistance (Chaos)
Resistance (Chaos).effect: +1 bonus die vs Chaos mutations/corruption tests.

Small.name: Small
Small.effect: Halfling trait; size and wound interactions per species rules.

Second Sight.name: Second Sight
Second Sight.effect: Sense Winds of Magic; magical awareness.

Sixth Sense.name: Sixth Sense
Sixth Sense.effect: Danger intuition; test to avoid surprise.

Rover.name: Rover
Rover.effect: Travel and fatigue benefits in wilderness.

Petty Magic.name: Petty Magic
Petty Magic.effect: Access petty spells per career/species rules.

Witch!.name: Witch!
Witch!.effect: Witch career talent; hexing and petty magic per book.
